title: Sweet And Gooey Zanzibari Flour Crumble
description: A sweet and gooey crumble dish featuring plain flour that can be enjoyed as a breakfast or snack. It's vegetarian-friendly.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the Plain Flour and Sugar. Mix well.
Add melted Coconut Oil and beaten Eggs into the Dry mixture. Stir until well combined. Add Vanilla Extract for flavoring.
Gradually add Baking Powder to the mixture while stirring continuously until it forms a dough-like consistency.
Pour the dough onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper or greased lightly, creating an even layer approximately 1/2 inch thick.
Bake in preheated oven for 30-45 minutes or until golden brown on top. Check doneness by inserting a toothpick into center; if clean, it's done.
Allow to cool slightly before slicing and serving.
